title: Theeyil Vizhundha Song Lyrics Varalaaru
stanzas:
Theeyil vizhundha thaena
ivan Theeyil vadintha thaena
thaayai kaakkum mahanaa
illai thaayumaanavanaa (2)

Mazhaiyin neer vaangi
mazhaiye azhuvadhu pol
thaayin uyir thaangi
thanayan azhuvaana

thangam pole irundhavalthaan
sarugai pole aanathanala
singam pole irundha magan
sevuliyai pole aavaanaa

Or sollil or ulagam amma
ammaa
ulagellaam or sollum ammaa(2)

nee sumandha pillaiyaai
naan irundhen ammaa
naan sumakkum pillaiyaai
nee aanaai ammaa

enaku yaedhum aanadhunna
unaku veru pillai undu
unaikaedhum aanadhunnaa
enakku veru thaayirukkaa ?

nenjai ootti valarthavalai
kannil maniyaai sumandhavalai
mannil vittu viduvaanaa
manadhil mattum sumappaanaa

thaayin madithaane
ulagam thodangumidam
thaayin kaaladiye
ulagam mudiyum idam

karunai thaayin ninaivinile
kallum konjam azhudhuvidum
kanneer thuligalin vegathile
kannin manigalum vilundhuvidum

Theeyil vizhundha thaena
ivan Theeyil vadintha thaena
thaayai kaakkum mahanaa
illai thaayumaanavanaa

seo.title: Theeyil Vizhundha Song Lyrics Varalaaru
seo.description: Full Theeyil Vizhundha songs lyrics, Varalaaru Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): AR Rahman.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Theeyil Vizhundha?

The song expresses deep emotions related to love and longing, reflecting the complexities of human relationships.

In which movie is Theeyil Vizhundha featured?

The song is featured in the movie Varalaaru, which explores themes of love and sacrifice.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by the renowned AR Rahman, known for his unique musical style.

When was Theeyil Vizhundha released?

The song was released on October 20, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Theeyil Vizhundha, the protagonist grapples with feelings of love and loss, beautifully encapsulated through AR Rahman's emotive singing. The song serves as a poignant reminder of the sacrifices made in love, resonating deeply with anyone who has experienced heartbreak. Vairamuthu's lyrics add layers of meaning, making it a standout piece in the Varalaaru soundtrack. Overall, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and reflection, inviting listeners to connect with their own emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Theeyil Vizhundha from the Varalaaru soundtrack is a mesmerizing composition by the legendary AR Rahman. This song beautifully captures the essence of longing and devotion, showcasing Rahman's soulful vocals paired with Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics. Dive into a world of emotions as you experience this timeless classic that resonates with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: This honey that fell from the sky is not just a sweet thing; it protects the mother, the true human being.
Like the rainwater that brings tears, the mother's life is tied to her child's tears.
The one who gives life will protect life; will they resolve the debts?
The one who was like gold will become like a burden; will the son who was like a lion become like a burden?
In one word, there is a world, mother; the whole world is just one word, mother.
I was the child you loved, mother; you were the child I cherished, mother.
If I am nothing, do you have another child? If I am nothing, do you have another mother?
The one who nurtured the heart will be like a gem in the eyes; will they leave the earth and only stay in the heart?
The world begins at the mother's feet; the world can be completed at the mother's feet.
Will the one who gave life protect life?
In the memory of the compassionate mother, even stones will shed a few tears; the drops of tears will flow with the speed of the eyes, and the eyes will overflow.
This honey that fell from the sky is not just a sweet thing; it protects the mother, the true human being.
